zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Colander於1490年出生在英國英格蘭時，她的父親John Colander30歲，母親Marianna Dale20歲。她於1510年與William Symes在英國英格蘭薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1565年在英國波克夏享年75歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭薩默塞特。

nameMeanings.name: Colander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: status name for the chairman or a member of a religious or other fraternity that held meetings on the first of each month, from Latin ad calendas.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Colander was born in 1490, in England, United Kingdom, her father, John Colander, was 30 and her mother, Marianna Dale, was 20. She married William Symes in 1510, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1565, in Berkshire, England, at the age of 75, and was buried in Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé William Symes en 1510, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1565, à Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Colanderが1490年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父John Colanderは30歳，母Marianna Daleは20歳であった。1510年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトでWilliam Symesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1565年にイギリスバークシュアイアで75歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスソメルセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Colander(이)가 1490년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Colander(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marianna Dale(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 William Symes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1565년 영국 버크실르에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Colander родилась в 1490 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Colander было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Marianna Dale, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Symes в 1510 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1565 г. в местности биркшир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания.
